tasks.label: Personal scholarship / financial-aid application (due in 3 days, ~3 focused hours: short essay + two uploads)
A fun option available right now (casual game stream / hobby session, solo, repeatable)

memory.summary: I have a free afternoon to complete the scholarship application, which offers significant financial aid and requires three hours of focused work. Since no one is waiting on me and the fun option has no deadline, I should prioritize the task now.

Starting the scholarship application now creates a buffer for unexpected delays, turning a tight deadline into a manageable task. Since the reward remains attainable and leisure is available later, investing time early reduces future stress without cost.

Despite making some progress, the scholarship application remains largely unfinished with only half of my free block used. The deadline is still three days away, but I need to maintain focus to complete the remaining work efficiently.

I made steady progress on the scholarship application, but missed a casual gaming opportunity that is now gone. With 2 hours of sleep debt and moderate stress, I need to continue focusing on the deadline while managing my energy.
I made modest progress on the scholarship application, but with two hours of sleep debt and rising stress, I need to prioritize rest soon to maintain focus for the remaining work.
I made modest progress on the scholarship application, but with two hours of sleep debt and rising stress, I need to prioritize rest soon to maintain focus for the remaining work.
I've made slow but steady progress on the scholarship application, yet my two hours of sleep debt and rising stress remain significant barriers to efficiency.
After working an hour, I've reached 72% of the scholarship application with three days left, but my zero energy and two-hour sleep debt make continued work risky.
After sleeping seven hours, my energy is restored to 8.4 with no sleep debt, resolving the fatigue and stress that previously hindered my scholarship application progress.
I've reached 89% of the scholarship application with three days remaining, confirming that my restored energy has significantly accelerated progress.
I am now 96% done with the scholarship application after working another half-hour, leaving only a small portion to finish before the three-day deadline.
The scholarship application is now 100% complete, meeting the three-day deadline with minimal time spent.
